response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages (including Python, JavaScript, C++, D), and proven leadership in shipping complex systems, but lacks explicit evidence of building enterprise-scale experimentation or growth platforms with telemetry, feature flagging, and statistical rigor — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience across languages (JS/TS, C++, D, Java) and systems (distributed, real-time, microservices)
Demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects, workshops, and mentoring
Proven ability to build scalable infrastructure (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby)
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or operating experimentation frameworks, feature flags, or growth measurement systems
Lack of documented experience with AI-driven engineering velocity tools or statistical analysis for experiments
Minimal mention of cross-team stakeholder alignment or product-driven metric translation
